ShortDescription.Value: Automatically demolishes abandoned, condemned, and destroyed buildings.

Publish.LongDescription:
# Auto Bulldozer
Tired of manually clearing abandoned buildings? This mod does it for you.
## Features - Automatically demolishes **abandoned** buildings (on by default) - Optionally demolishes **condemned** buildings - Optionally clears **destroyed** buildings (fire/disaster rubble) - Master on/off switch and per-category toggles in Options → Mods → Auto Bulldozer - **Grace period**: optionally wait N in-game days before demolishing abandoned buildings, giving them a chance to be re-occupied - **Adjustable sweep frequency** (1–64 scans per in-game day) - Session statistics per category, with a reset button - Lightweight: scans a few times per in-game day, no per-frame cost
## Notes - Demolition uses the game's own deletion pipeline, so it's save-safe - Safe to add or remove from a save at any time
Publish.ChangeLog: Added grace period for abandoned buildings (0-30 in-game days). Added sweeps-per-day setting (1-64). Added per-category statistics and a reset button. Options now gray out when the master switch is off.
